title: Add background sync for mobile app
original_text: Implemented background synchronization for mobile app. Added background fetch for iOS. Added WorkManager for Android background tasks. Implemented incremental sync to save battery. Implemented sync conflict resolution. Added sync progress indicators. Added sync failure retry logic. Added battery optimization for sync. Result: background sync working efficiently.
expected_body_lines: - Add WorkManager for Android background tasks
- Implement incremental sync to save battery
- Add sync progress and retry logic
